description: aria-knowledge lifecycle hooks for Antigravity. Hooks are byte-equivalent to the Claude Code plugin port with the following adaptations: (1) config path is ~/.gemini/antigravity/aria-knowledge.local.md instead of ~/.claude/aria-knowledge.local.md; (2) PreCompact and PostCompact hooks are retired — Antigravity sessions use a persistent sandbox, not context compaction; (3) PreToolUse Edit|Write deny semantic is documented + fail-closed in Antigravity (unlike the Claude Code port which was fail-open on hook error — safety default is unchanged: hooks still fail-open on script error, but Antigravity's deny path is fully supported and tested). Hook scripts are in bin/ and are sourced from ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/ for portability — the same variable is supported in Antigravity plugin contexts.
